name: warmstart
description: The warmstart marketplace: warm starts and dispatch discipline for Claude Code, distributed from one repository.

plugins.name: warmstart
plugins.description: Warm starts for Claude Code: durable session state in a few markdown files, injected on session start and written back at wrapup.

plugins.name: dispatch
plugins.description: Subagent dispatch discipline: a guard hook that blocks under-briefed or model-unpinned dispatches, plus the playbook it enforces, injected at session start.

plugins.name: workflows
plugins.description: Fan-out-and-verify multi-agent workflows: cheap finder agents review in parallel, expensive skeptic agents adversarially verify, and only findings that survive refutation are reported.
